audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 167-172 implement all three branches of the scaling formula exactly as asserted: multiply by 10^(18-dec) when dec<18, divide by 10^(dec-18) when dec>18, and no-op when dec==18 — covering the complete uint8 range. Zero-decimals are rejected at registration time (line 253 in _applyFeedInfoUpdates), and Solidity 0.8 overflow protection prevents silent arithmetic errors. The scaled price is stored at line 178 with SafeCast ensuring no truncation.
